title: Age Of Weirdo [RP]
description: Resource Pack to change the patterns of hostile and fabulous creatures in the game
body:
**Age Of Weirdo [RP]** -This is a resource pack for the main _**Age Of Weirdo**_ mod, if people want to play without modifications in the game, then this pack completely changes the design of hostile and magical minecraft creatures. To start playing with it, install **OptiFine HD**.


![Creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1543721ae592f2bce67bb4e67d6e996e8372ad52.png)
